phoenix-exam-service · Java 21 · Spring Boot 3.1.11

Exam API

Examination, attempts, proctoring, results.

120 endpoints 18 areas 24 paginated
Foundations Endpoints Authorization Pagination

§Foundations

Overview

Service
Exam
Artifact
phoenix-exam-service
Surface
120 endpoints across 18 areas

Authorization

  • (no explicit gate) — 118 of 120 (98%)
  • isValidInstitutionUser — 1 of 120 (1%)
  • isValidUser — 1 of 120 (1%)

Pagination

Endpoints binding Spring Pageable accept the standard page, size, and sort query parameters.

24 endpoints: /exports, /exportHistory, /feedbacks, /imports, /items, /items, …

Response envelope

Most handlers return ResponseEntity<APIResponse>. Endpoint detail describes the inner data payload.

{
  "status":  <int>,
  "error":   { ... } | null,
  "data":    <object> | null,
  "traceId": "..."
}

§Endpoints by area

A runnable cURL skeleton. Replace :placeholder values and $TOKEN with your environment.

curl --request DELETE \
  --url "https://api.medlern.example/assets" \
  --header "tenantId: :tenantId" \
  --header "userId: :userId" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data '{
  "assets": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "externalId": 0,
      "externalRevisionId": 0,
      "embeddedResource": "string",
      "statusId": 0,
      "createdBy": 0,
      "updatedBy": 0,
      "tenantId": 0,
      "createdTime": "string",
      "updatedTime": "string"
    }
  ]
}'

GET /items get Qti Items Admin13 pages
paginated

Request headers

NameRequiredDefault · notes
tenantIdyes
userIdyes

Query parameters

NameTypeNotes
order-bystringoptional
querystring
identifierstring
itemTypeIdlist<long>
labelstring
statusIdinteger
isPublishedboolean
testIdlong
itemBankIdlong
metadatalist<string>
itemIdslist<long>
typeset<long>
topicsset<long>
categorystring
createdBylist<long>
sourcelist<string>
createdDateFromDateTime
createdDateToDateTime

Plus the common pagination parameters — see Pagination.

APIResponse envelopes a data slot of ItemListDTO. status · error · data · warning · traceId

Response data

ItemListDTO 3 fields
total Integer
items array<ItemDTO>
pagination PaginationDTO
pageNumber Integer
pageSize Integer
totalCount Long
totalPages Integer
isFirst Boolean
isLast Boolean

POST /items add Qti Items
post

NameRequiredDefault · notes
tenantIdyes
userIdyes

Request body

QtiItemData 1 field

Used by

No UI pages found in the Angular theme that consume this endpoint directly.
PUT /items get Qti Items Data
paginatedput

Request headers

NameRequiredDefault · notes
tenantIdyes
userIdyes

Query parameters

NameTypeNotes
order-bystringoptional

Plus the common pagination parameters — see Pagination.

Request body

Map<String, ItemRequestDTO> [<key>] 17 fields
query String
identifier String
itemTypeId array<Long>
label String
statusId Integer
isPublished Boolean
testId Long
itemBankId Long
metadata array<String>

type array<Long>

GET /itemBanks get Qti Item Banks
paginated

Request headers

NameRequiredDefault · notes
tenantIdyes
userIdyes

Query parameters

NameTypeNotes
order-bystringoptional
querystringoptional
testIdlongoptional
labelstringoptional
metadataslist<string>optional
statusIdintegeroptional

Plus the common pagination parameters — see Pagination.

APIResponse envelopes a data slot of QtiItemBanksData. status · error · data · warning · traceId

Response data

QtiItemBanksData 3 fields
itemBanks array<QtiItemBankDTO>
pagination PaginationDTO
pageNumber Integer
pageSize Integer
totalCount Long
totalPages Integer
isFirst Boolean
isLast Boolean
total Integer

A runnable cURL skeleton. Replace :placeholder values and $TOKEN with your environment.

curl --request POST \
  --url "https://api.medlern.example/itemBanks" \
  --header "tenantId: :tenantId" \
  --header "userId: :userId" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data '{

NameTypeNotes

NameRequiredDefault · notes

A runnable cURL skeleton. Replace :placeholder values and $TOKEN with your environment.

curl --request PUT \
  --url "https://api.medlern.example/items/:itemId/label" \
  --header "tenantId: :tenantId" \
  --header "userId: :userId"

NameRequiredDefault · notes

userIdyes

Request body

QtiTestAssessmentData 1 field
tests array<QtiTestAssessmentDTO>
testId Long
status String

Request body

ExampleQtiTestAssessmentDataMediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE 
{
  "tests": [
    {
      "testId": 0,
      "status": "string"
    }
  ]
}

A runnable cURL skeleton. Replace :placeholder values and $TOKEN with your environment.

curl --request PATCH \
  --url "https://api.medlern.example/tests:status" \
  --header "tenantId: :tenantId" \
  --header "userId: :userId" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data '{
  "tests": [
    {
      "testId": 0,
      "status": "string"
    }
  ]
}'

Used by

No UI pages found in the Angular theme that consume this endpoint directly.
POST /tests/{testId}/accessResources add Access Resource
post

Path parameters

NameTypeNotes
testIdlong

Request headers

NameRequiredDefault · notes
tenantIdyes
userIdyes

Query parameters

NameTypeNotes
testRevisionIdlong

Request body

AccessResourceData 1 field
accessResources array<TestAccessControlDTO>
id Long
accessResourceId Long
testRevisionId Long
accessResourceType String
qtiTestRevision QtiTestRevision
isDeleted Boolean

A runnable cURL skeleton. Replace :placeholder values and $TOKEN with your environment.

curl --request POST \
  --url "https://api.medlern.example/tests/:testId/accessResources?testRevisionId=:testRevisionId" \

          "value": "string",

        }
      ],
      "itemTypes": [
        {
          "itemTypeId": 0
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}'
